hero.title: Go Tswa mo go Tlhokegeng ga Gore Batho ba Kgone go Tsena mo Di-repo Tsa Setšhaba
hero.lead: IATF e thusa mekgatlho, ditlhopha le batho ka bongwe go fetola ditlhokego tsa mmatota tsa go fitlhelela tshedimosetso go nna diporojeke tsa setšhaba tsa open source.
support: Diporojeke tse di amogetsweng di phasaladiwa mo mokgatlhong wa IATF wa GitHub ka fa tlase ga laesense ya copyleft mme di tlhabololwa phatlalatsa ke moenjiniri yo o ikarabelelang.

header.kicker: Mokgwa wa go dira wa setšhaba
header.title: Tsela e e sa raraanang e e dirisiwang ke batho botlhe ya go fitlhelela dithulaganyo tsa khomputara

paragraphs: Ka foromo, mongwe le mongwe a ka romela bothata jwa go fitlhelela kwa IATF. Fa setlhopha se ka bo tsaya, polokelo ya setšhaba ya GitHub e a bulwa gore tiro e dirwe.

Porojeke nngwe le nngwe e e amogetsweng e na le legae la botlhe le le phepafetseng la khoutu, dikgwetlho, ditokomane, le go gololwa, le tlhabololo e e eteletsweng pele ke moenjenere yo o ikarabelelang.

specCard.title: Mokgwa wa go dira wa setšhaba

terms.definition: Bothata jwa mmatota jwa go kgona go tsena
Go tshwanelega ga tiro le kgonagalo ya tiragatso

header.title: Tsela e e dirang ka yone
header.intro: Modela ono o dirwa gore o nne o le monnye ka boomo gore go nne motlhofo go tsamaya mo tseleng e batho botlhe ba tsamayang mo go yone.

steps.title: Kopo e a dirwa
paragraphs: Mokgatlho, setlhopha kgotsa motho a le mongwe a ka dira kopo e e theilweng mo ditlhokegong tsa mmatota tsa go fitlhelela.
Dikopo di ka simololwa ka webosaete, ka imeili go contact@iatf.cc, kgotsa ka go dirisa Discord.

steps.title: IATF e a e sekaseka
paragraphs: Re tlhatlhoba gore a tiro eo e a tshwanela, a e mosola, le gore a e ka tsenngwa mo porojekeng e e bulegileng e e ka dirisiwang ke mongwe le mongwe.

steps.title: Go tlhamiwa polokelo ya tshedimosetso ya botlhe
paragraphs: Fa porojeke e amogelwa, e phasaladiwa mo mokgatlhong wa IATF GitHub ka laesense ya copyleft.
Polokelo e nna legae la botlhe la khoutu, dikgang, ditokomane, le go gololwa.

steps.title: Moenjenere yo o nang le maikarabelo ke ene a eteletseng pele porojeke eno
paragraphs: Moenjenere yo o ikarabelelang o abelwa polokelo ya porojeke mme tlhabololo e dirwa phatlalatsa.

header.title: Leba tiro e o e dirang gone jaanong kgotsa simolola porojeke e e rileng

paragraphs: Dirisa rejisetara go bona gore ke eng se se setseng se bonwa ke batho botlhe, kgotsa simolola go tsaya tshedimosetso fa e le gore bothata bongwe jo bo rileng jwa go fitlhelela bo tshwanetse go nna porojeke.
